---
title: "What is AI?"
subtitle: >
  Lecture 1 lesson plan, {{< var course.code >}}, {{< var course.term >}}
---

## Learning outcomes

{{< include /_includes/learning-outcomes/_lecture-01_learning-outcomes.qmd >}}

## Example content

This content will appear in all versions.

::: {.content-visible when-profile="instructor"}
This content will only appear in the instructor version.
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="ta"}
This content will only appear in the TA version.
:::

::: {.content-visible when-profile="coordinator"}
This content will only appear in the coordinator version.
:::

1. How different from previous topic
2. Algorithmic idea
    - Foundations
    - Representation
    - Algorithm
3. Historical impact and applications
4. Worked example
    - NLP
    - Graphs
5. Breakout
